north_star: Be the Northern Ontario marketing, automation, and AI partner every local business thinks of first — a self-running retainer book that compounds without Aiden as the bottleneck, so his time goes to strategy, product, and new offers instead of delivery.

Sign 2 new retainer clients by end of Q3 2026 via the clickbait-to-article prospecting pipeline across Thunder Bay (HVAC, plumbers, golf), Sudbury (construction, golf), North Bay (plumbers), and Sault Ste. Marie local, with Canada-wide fallback acceptable if the Northern Ontario pipeline runs dry.
bottleneck: Reyco domain cutover pending DealerSpike transfer; 125-image manual catalog pulls in progress (Aiden tonight); cortextos PR queue 42 pending Aiden review; Cloudflare-block class extension banked (cloud-proxy infra needed for fleet portal scrapes)
